reasoning: Stock prices approximate a random walk with slight positive drift due to the equity risk premium. Without specific upcoming catalysts to evaluate, I rely on the broad market base rate of a ~51-54% chance of a nominally positive return over short-to-medium term horizons (1 week to 3 months). In accordance with the instruction that probabilities for distant dates must be closer to 0.5 to reflect increasing uncertainty, I taper the predictions from 0.53 for the nearest date down to 0.51 for the furthest date.
